task_description: Write a market summary for electric cargo bikes, using research from a sub-agent.

conversation.speaker: Agent (Thought)
conversation.text: The user wants a market summary. I'll delegate research to the researcher sub-agent, then have the writer draft the summary.

conversation.speaker: Agent (Thought)
conversation.text: Researching: I need market size, growth rate, and key players for electric cargo bikes.

conversation.speaker: Environment
conversation.text: Top result: global e-cargo-bike market estimated at $1.4B in 2025, 13% CAGR.

conversation.speaker: Environment
conversation.text: Key players: Urban Arrow, Riese & Müller, Tern, Rad Power Bikes.

conversation.speaker: Agent (Thought)
conversation.text: Research complete: $1.4B market, 13% CAGR, four key players identified.

conversation.speaker: Agent (Thought)
conversation.text: Drafting the summary from the researcher's findings.

conversation.speaker: Agent
conversation.text: The electric cargo bike market reached an estimated $1.4B in 2025 and is growing at 13% annually, led by Urban Arrow, Riese & Müller, Tern, and Rad Power Bikes...
